signals.headline: Russia's Jan-Feb 2026 GDP contracts 1
signals.raw:
Russia's Jan-Feb 2026 GDP contracts 1.8% YoY, Putin acknowledges downturn | YES | MED confidence**  
Putin confirmed an 1.8% GDP contraction for January-February 2026 (vs. same period 2025) during an economic meeting, citing losses in manufacturing, industry, and construction, after 1% growth in 2025.[2] Forecasts conflict: Central Bank at +1.6% for Q1, Russian Academy of Sciences at -1.5% YoY.[2]

signals.headline: Lakers Injury Confirmations Boost Series Odds vs Rockets | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Injury Confirmations Boost Series Odds vs Rockets | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Austin Reaves (oblique) and Luka Doncic (hamstring) are ruled out for Game 2 vs Houston on Apr 21, while the Lakers hold a 1-0 lead after LeBron James (19 pts, 13 ast) and Luke Kennard (27 pts) powered a 107-98 Game 1 win without them; Rockets' Kevin Durant missed Game 1 (knee) with Game 2 return update pending.[2
